title: cacalia oligophylla
intro: Cacalia oligophylla, also known as the few-leaved skullcap, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of flavonoids and saponins. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, thanks to its ability to reduce inflammation and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Cacalia oligophylla can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote overall health and well-being.
